I'm Siva Manikanta Chittivelu, an MCA student at Narayana Engineering College, Nellore, with a deep passion for Python development and software engineering. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code that solves real problems.

My background spans a 4-month Data Science internship, academic projects covering console games and web development, and certifications in AI and Python. I approach every challenge with an Agile mindset and attention to quality.
